pi_items.source: setup_task.sh copies the environment's sample_project.xml to this location
export_result.sh expects the final file at this path

pi_items.metadata_value: [{"task_name": "Requirements Gathering", "expected_wbs": "Phase A"}, {"task_name": "System Architecture Design", "expected_wbs": "Phase B"}, {"task_name": "Database Schema Design", "expected_wbs": "Phase B.1"}]
pi_items.source: Inspection of the actual sample_project.xml (a Microsoft Project 'Commercial Construction' template from 2004) reveals that it does not contain the tasks listed in the metadata. The checks are hallucinated assumptions about the template's content.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a standard 'Commercial Construction' project template, copied to /home/ga/Projects/wbs_task.xml, and the result must be saved to /home/ga/Projects/custom_coded_project.xml. The evaluation checks in the metadata (expecting software tasks like 'Requirements Gathering') are hallucinated and contradict the actual contents of the construction template.
